# MUSE — The AI Coding Governance System

> Roles, Memory, Skills, in Plain Markdown. Zero dependencies.

MUSE is the only full governance system for AI pair programming. It goes beyond format specs (AGENTS.md, .cursorrules) and memory infrastructure (mem0, MemOS) by providing role isolation, persistent memory, 57 skills, cross-role directives, TF-IDF search, and visual dashboards — all in pure Markdown.

## Core Concept

AGENTS.md defines the format. MUSE builds the system.

MUSE wraps AI coding assistants with a governance protocol that enables:
- Role-based context isolation (build, qa, growth, strategy)
- Dual-layer memory persistence (short-term + long-term)
- 57 reusable skills loaded on demand
- Cross-role async directive queue with delivery tracking
- TF-IDF search across all project context
- Web Dashboard + VS Code Extension for visualization

## Layer Model

```
L3  Memory Infrastructure   mem0 · MemOS · memsearch     ← MUSE doesn't compete here
L2  Governance System       🎭 MUSE                       ← Only player at this layer
L1  Workflow Kits           Spec Kit · sudocode            ← MUSE covers this + more
L0  Format Specs            AGENTS.md · .cursorrules       ← MUSE is compatible
```

## Key Features

- **Two-Layer Memory**: Daily logs (`memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`) + long-term lessons (`MEMORIES.md`)
- **Role Isolation**: Build, QA, Growth, Strategy — each role reads only its own state file
- **Directive Queue**: Async cross-role messaging with 🟡/✅ status protocol
- **MCP Server**: Built-in Bash MCP server with 6 JSON-RPC tools, zero dependencies
- **57 Skills**: Core (6) + Toolkit (42) + Ecosystem (9) reusable skill packs
- **TF-IDF Search**: Zero-dependency ranked search across memory, roles, and skills
- **Auto Memory Capture**: Automatic LESSON/DECISION/FACT extraction on session end
- **Semantic Compression**: 3-tier context compression based on session length
- **Session Checkpoint**: Silent progress save every 15 interaction rounds
- **Defensive Auto-Save**: Crash recovery with at most 10 rounds of data loss
- **Web Dashboard**: Online at muse.mythslabs.ai/dashboard (100% client-side)
- **VS Code Extension**: Roles, Skills, Memory tree views + in-editor dashboard

## Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/myths-labs/muse.git
cd muse && ./setup.sh
```

## Commands

- `/resume [role]` — Boot and restore context
- `/bye` — One-click wrap-up, auto-save
- `/ctx` — Context health check (🟢🟡🔴)
- `/distill` — Condense daily logs to long-term memory
- `/search` — TF-IDF search across memory, roles, skills
- `/sync` — Cross-role synchronization

## Supported Tools

| Tool | Install Command |
|------|----------------|
| Claude Code | `./scripts/install.sh --tool claude` |
| Cursor | `./scripts/install.sh --tool cursor` |
| Windsurf | `./scripts/install.sh --tool windsurf` |
| Gemini CLI | `./scripts/install.sh --tool gemini` |
| Codex CLI | `./scripts/install.sh --tool codex` |
| OpenClaw | `./scripts/install.sh --tool openclaw` |
